ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment fund */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was created */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager responsible for the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., equity, bond, mixed) */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the fund (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "target_return" REAL /* Target return for the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the company */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP identifier for the company's securities */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the company's stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund in which the investment is made */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company in which the investment is made */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment report */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the investment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the investment in the fund as a percentage */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the shares */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the investment */,
  "investment_category" TEXT /* Category of the investment (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in investment management */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund associated with the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_date" TEXT /* Date of the portfolio report */,
  "performance_index" REAL /* Performance index of the portfolio */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the portfolio */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return of the portfolio */,
  "diversification_score" REAL /* Diversification score of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
